recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: The Contractor
recommendations.overview: Former CIA Operative James Dial is coaxed back into action to kill a terrorist in London, but it all goes wrong and he is forced into hiding, where he meets and befriends a 12 year old girl.

recommendations.title: Ruthless
recommendations.overview: A high school coach, whose teenage daughter was murdered, takes matters into his own hands by going after the men who kidnap his students for their sex trafficking operation.

recommendations.title: True Lies
recommendations.overview: A fearless, globe-trotting, terrorist-battling secret agent has his life turned upside down when he discovers his wife might be having an affair with a used car salesman while terrorists smuggle nuclear war heads into the United States.

recommendations.title: Unlocked
recommendations.overview: After failing to apprehend the terrorist behind a Paris attack that claimed dozens of lives, CIA agent Alice Racine is forced to live in London as a caseworker. Her mentor unexpectedly calls her back into action when the CIA discovers that another at

recommendations.title: The Marine 3: Homefront
recommendations.overview: A Marine must do whatever it takes to save his kidnapped sister and stop a terrorist attack masterminded by a radical militia group.

recommendations.title: Hungerford
recommendations.overview: The lives of a group of teenagers are turned upside down when their town is taken over by sinister forces.

recommendations.title: Easy!
recommendations.overview: The life of a melancholy professor is turned upside down when he discovers that a rebellious teenager he is tutoring is actually his son.

recommendations.title: Boy Missing
recommendations.overview: When her son's alleged kidnapper is released for lack of solid evidence, a reputable and well-known attorney takes matters into her own hands with unintended and spectacularly disastrous consequences.

recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.
